reviews.review_msg: Very little to no valuable feedback was given, comments included no real reflection on the work submitted. Other comments were simple one word statements (ex. 'good', 'great'). Was difficult to understand what the full expectations were as rubrics were not provided or changed between assignments. Content was interesting but lecture lack substance.

Lectures are just her reading out poorly made slides for hours. Get ready to lose grades for something you did not know was being graded because her rubrics are bad or because you didn't do MLA format good. Over half of our class of 12 thought she was a bad teacher. The others probably agree too but I did not get to ask them.
